summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Trading Bot Builder P4 (ML Bot Builder) and P5 (Admin Terminal) features. Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed). Frontend fully functional - all pages loading correctly with no errors.

working_endpoints: ML Templates - GET /api/ml/templates (5 templates: Trend Direction, Volatility, Momentum, Reversal, Breakout)
ML Features - GET /api/ml/features (30+ features across Momentum, Trend, Volatility, Volume categories)
ML Models - GET /api/ml/models (list user's trained models)
Admin Dashboard - GET /api/admin/dashboard (users, trading stats, capital overview)
Admin Users - GET /api/admin/users (user management with search/filter)
News Feed - GET /api/news/feed (market news with MOCKED data)
Sentiment Analysis - POST /api/news/analyze (keyword-based fallback, DeepSeek insufficient balance)

critical_code_review_comments: News feed data is MOCKED - using static headlines for demonstration
AI Sentiment analysis falls back to keyword-based analysis (DeepSeek API has insufficient balance)
ML Bot Builder templates are well-structured with proper feature sets
Admin Terminal has comprehensive user management and monitoring capabilities
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user admin@test.com with admin role
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0-P5 features verified working. ML Bot Builder (P4) has 5 templates: Trend Direction Classifier, Volatility Predictor, Momentum Score Predictor, Reversal Pattern Detector, Breakout Probability Predictor. Admin Terminal (P5) shows platform stats: 5 total users, 4 strategies, 9 backtests, 1 active deployment. News sentiment uses keyword fallback due to DeepSeek insufficient balance. Market data uses real yfinance prices.

admin_terminal_p5.dashboard_tab: Working - shows users, trading, capital stats

news_sentiment.symbol_sentiment_gauges: Working - BTCUSD, ETHUSD, AAPL, TSLA, SPY
